description_long: This is a large, irregularly shaped rock with a predominantly gray coloration and subtle variations in tone, including some darker speckles and faint streaks. The surface is rough and uneven, with visible pitting and natural weathering, suggesting exposure to the elements over time. One side of the rock is relatively flat, while the other sides are more angular and jagged, giving it a blocky yet organic appearance. The edges are rounded in some areas and sharper in others, with no clear symmetry. The rock appears solid and dense, typical of stones used as natural barriers or landscaping features in urban environments. Its size and mass would make it difficult to move without mechanical assistance.
description: A large, rough gray rock with irregular, blocky sides and natural weathering, featuring both flat and jagged surfaces.
description_view_0: The rock appears blocky and upright, with a slightly sloped top and a rough, pitted surface.
description_view_1: This side shows a broad, flat face with subtle streaks and a more elongated profile.
description_view_2: From this angle, the rock looks narrower and taller, with visible angular edges and a pronounced ridge.
description_view_3: The rock displays a long, gently curved surface with rough texture and some visible indentations.
attribute_location: urban park or landscaped sidewalk edge
